{{Infobox character
| name = Aila Escalon
| aliases = Aila
| parents = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|pull a force-blade from Subspace, [[Watchtower Stance]], [[Zenith Blade]], grow four hands from her back that melt into dark goo, [[Combat Art]], reflect missiles into energy, strike through the Absolute Burial spell with multiple Zenith Blades, split into clones, [[Hallow Divide]], manifest an orange shield}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]], [[Lichborn crews]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Combat Artist]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

''See also: [[Aila Escalon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila Escalon is a skilled [[Combat Artist]] who utilizes [[Aethertech]] augmentations to enhance her capabilities. While she possesses significant advantages in battle, such as the ability to utilize a [[sword]] and navigate [[Subspace]], she has faced difficulties when encountering D'Niss swarms or starship explosions. Aila is associated with the [[Escalon Company]] and has been known to fight for the [[Zenith Blade]]. In combat, she displays a mocking or delighted demeanor, often characterized by a wide grin. Her abilities include the use of the [[Hallow Divide]] and the ability to emerge from shadows or [[Subspace]]. She has been described as a formidable force, capable of standing against the power of Fathom and engaging in intense confrontations with various entities.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila Escalon is a ten-year-old [[Combat Artist]] with brown hair and a rare [[Aethertech]] affinity, though she required induced artificial aging to grow beyond that age. Possessing a body made almost entirely of high-grade [[Aethertech]] and an internal [[Drive]], she can manifest four hands from her back that melt into dark goo and utilize a [[Zenith Device]] to pull force-blades from [[Subspace]]. During combat, she employs various [[Combat Arts]], such as the [[Hallow Divide]] and the [[Watchtower Stance]], while utilizing eye augmentations to enhance her vision. As a member of [[Solstice]] and the daughter of [[Omega]], she has engaged in massive battles against foes like the [[Red Divine Titan]], Raion, Sola, and [[Horizon]] simultaneously. Even when her body is partially blown apart, her wounds dissolve into black ooze to regenerate via mass stored in [[Subspace]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">49</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila is a character who possesses an internal [[Drive]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's body is almost entirely made of high-grade [[Aethertech]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] is a [[Combat Artist]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] can pull a [[force-blade]] from [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] uses the [[Watchtower Stance]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila struck with the [[Zenith Blade]] to begin a battle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila is a ten-year-old girl with brown hair.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila can grow four hands from her back that melt into dark goo.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila has a rare [[Aethertech]] affinity.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] launched an attack that shook the ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] is the daughter of [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] uses a [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] possesses a [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] is the full name of Aila.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila has a human form.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] has a human form.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] was dragging the ship into [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila was waiting in a life-pod for the [[Lichborn crews]] to remove her.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila has joined the enemy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] is piloting a star-fighter and stands in the way of the narrator.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila is a member of [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila uses a [[Combat Art]] to reflect missiles into energy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's vision is based on augmentations similar to [[Omega]]'s.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila can strike through the [[Absolute Burial]] spell with multiple [[Zenith]] Blades.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's chest was pierced by beams of white light from behind.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila can execute strikes of her [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila has [[Aethertech]] augmentations in her eyes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila possesses the [[Zenith Blade]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila can split into clones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's regeneration mass is stored in a pocket of [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila uses the [[Hallow Divide]] to fight.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila fought [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's eyes burn orange.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c33">''The Pilot'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila required induced artificial aging to grow past the age of ten.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c33" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila has made hunting [[Omega]]'s ancient enemies difficult.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila can be called back when an alert is made.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]]'s eyes glow with orange light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] can use the [[Hallow Divide]] ability.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] has fought Raion, Sola, [[Omega]], and [[Horizon]] simultaneously.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's father is mentioned by Aila.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila can manifest an orange shield.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila is fighting the [[Red Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila withdrew the [[Zenith Blade]] and stood next to [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] is an enemy who can pass through [[Subspace]] and carries a [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] has two remaining clones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's body was partially blown apart by [[Starhammer]]'s fist.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila's wounds dissolve into black ooze and begin to regenerate immediately.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Aila used the [[Zenith Blade]] for protection.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola had been fighting Aila.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Unfortunately,” Elios said, “her Aethertech affinity is particularly rare.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Omega, we’re about to fire on your daughter,” I said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Solstice]]
[[Category:Lichborn crews]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
